description: This file defines a set of Data Transfer Objects (DTOs) related to loan application draft operations within the BusinessLoanAPI project. It contains record classes for create, update, patch, readiness check, submit, and response structures, with annotations for schema documentation and validation.

classes.name: LoanDraftDtos
classes.description: A final utility class containing nested record classes for various loan draft operations such as creation, updating, patching, checking readiness, submitting, and responding.
